positive: A detailed, symmetrical forest silhouette design featuring various stylized woodland creatures and botanical elements. Subjects include foxes, deer, owls, and detailed ferns, all rendered as solid, deep indigo silhouettes against a negative space. The composition is central and balanced, designed for maximum visual impact on apparel. The style is flat vector illustration mixed with intricate line work, emphasizing strong contrast and clean, sharp edges. Use a limited, sophisticated color palette: deep indigo, burnt orange, and cream accents. The overall mood is mysterious, whimsical, and elegant. Minimalist, highly stylized, print-ready artwork.
negative: low resolution, blurry, text, watermark, signature, artist name, logo, messy, cluttered, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, artifacts, writing, out of focus
